stage: Stage A volume pass — §7 Post-Closure Addendum
stageBDecision: STAGE_B_MAY_ENABLE — execution_created threshold met and entry_routing not action_required

entryRouting.recommendation: Entry routing is performing well. Consider widening the intent-first rollout.

trustedForm.explanation: Trusted form routing shares the weak-fallback signal. A decreasing trend confirms form routing is absorbing formerly-weak routes.
